# David Griffin — Davie3

> Personal site of David Griffin (Davie3), a System Development Engineer at Twitch building cloud-native systems with TypeScript, Node.js, and AWS. This site covers my background, skills, open-source projects, and contact information.

## Pages

- [Home](https://davie3.com/): Landing page with intro and links to the main sections.
- [About](https://davie3.com/about): Bio, career journey, skills, professional experience, and education.
- [Portfolio](https://davie3.com/portfolio): Public open-source projects pulled live from my GitHub profile.
- [Contact](https://davie3.com/contact): Contact form to get in touch.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](https://davie3.com/privacy): How I collect, use, and protect visitor data, including third-party services, retention, and rights.
- [GitHub profile](https://github.com/davie3): Source of the projects shown on the portfolio page.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/davie3): Professional profile.
